headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered

article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] My first 24 hours with Siri AI on the Mac Company : The Verge AI Summary : I turned off Siri on the Mac years ago and never looked back. Similarly, I found Apple Intelligence so fruitless I never engage with it. But the new Siri AI coming to macOS 27 Golden Gate has at least Link :
